Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Loath Grip Bone Ring Unique ID: 32fbb7726275a998050ee68f4e291e41e03c010bfc5c4289b1a3f2c038e68e25 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 1 Minions have +15% to all Elemental Resistances {fractured}Minions deal 42% increased Damage +95 to maximum Life Minions have 28% increased maximum Life Minions have 26% increased Movement Speed Minions have +24% to all Elemental Resistances {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: UNIQUE The Golden Charlatan Lion Sword Unique ID: dd1a281fd23ee13f0847001af3584b50d974f9832d8fca0b3f2828419c0bb24c Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-R-R-B-R-B LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}1% increased Attack Speed per 8% Quality +50 to Strength and Dexterity +200 Intelligence Requirement 203% increased Physical Damage 11% increased Attack Speed 168% increased Critical Strike Chance Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy +1 to maximum Mana per 2 Intelligence

Rarity: UNIQUE Venarius' Astrolabe Astrolabe Amulet Unique ID: 3d2f434a53cb2ba17d7f57eb8f90a5522178bdfceabaedff35bdfc8cc19afc71 Shaper Item Elder Item Warlord Item Hunter Item Crusader Item Redeemer Item Item Level: 86 LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Allocates Soul Thief Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed Has Elder, Shaper and all Conqueror Influences The stars are aligned if you have 6 Influence types among other Equipped Items You have Elemental Conflux if the stars are aligned +3 to Level of all Elemental Skill Gems if the stars are aligned +1 to Level of all Elemental Support Gems if the stars are aligned
